body.title: Convention: new files include author-model docstring tag
body.result: audit_check_author_model_tag.py + palace rule + 28 tests. Header tag (# author-model: <token>) recognized in comment OR docstring, case-insensitive. Enforcement on new files in wild_igor/, lab/utility_closet/, lab/claudecode/; exempt: tests/, __init__.py. Forward-only. New files self-comply. 4193 regression pass.
body.description:
Add a convention: when a model creates a NEW file, the top-of-file docstring includes a `# author-model: <name>` tag. Companion to T-blame-with-model — blame enrichment handles edits, header tag handles new-file provenance (which blame loses when files get rewritten).

Mechanism:
- Update audit-precode skill (or audit-debris) to flag new files (added in diff, not modified) without the tag
- Add palace rule theigors/rules/author-model-tag with the convention
- Add audit_check_author_model_tag.py — scans for new files in a diff range, reports those without the tag

**Affected files:** new lab/claudecode/audit_check_author_model_tag.py + new palace rule + minor edit to audit-precode/audit-debris skill.
**Design rules:** approach-frame (positive: 'tag new files with author model').
**Scope boundary:** in scope: convention + audit check. Out of scope: retroactive tag injection on existing files (let it apply forward only).
**Test plan:** unit tests for the audit check on synthetic file fixtures.
